# CareerSteps

CareerSteps is an AI-powered career guidance platform helping students worldwide choose the right careers after 10th and 12th.

Website:
https://careersteps.in

Description:
Free AI Career Test, Career Guidance, Career Planning, Career Options, Entrance Exams, Study Abroad, Government Jobs, AI Careers, Engineering, Medical, Commerce, Arts and Future Skills.

Important Pages

Home
https://careersteps.in/

AI Career Test
https://careersteps.in/assessment.html

Explore Careers
https://careersteps.in/careers.html

Career Blogs
https://careersteps.in/blog.html

Career Options After 10th
https://careersteps.in/after10.html

Career Options After 12th
https://careersteps.in/after12.html

About
https://careersteps.in/about.html

Contact
https://careersteps.in/contact.html

Sitemap
https://careersteps.in/sitemap.xml

Robots
https://careersteps.in/robots.txt
